column8: orig draws L/R arrow sprites via DDraw BltFast (vtable +0x1c) onto button surface; port fe_draw_option_arrows uses D3D11 fe_draw_quad with ArrowButtonz texture page
orig walks button table releasing tracked DDraw surfaces (flag bit 1) and resets selection state; port frontend_reset_buttons memsets s_buttons[] - no tracked surfaces exist in D3D11
orig draws 4 BltColorFillToSurface 2px green borders on hovered display-mode button (color 0xc000); port draws 4 fe_draw_quad rectangles (color 0xFF008000) inline in render loop
orig snapshots button-table (0xd00 bytes, 13-word entries) into preview-prior backing store + clears live entries; port has no preview-snapshot mechanism - D3D11 backbuffer drawn fresh per frame
orig restores 0x340-word button-table snapshot back into live table after preview exit; port has no snapshot/restore path - DDraw button-surface registry collapsed into D3D11 immediate-mode draws
